warnings: logP from semi-empirical ΔG_solv differences is screening-grade; ±1 log unit typical.

Each leg is an electronic-energy difference on a single frozen geometry — no ZPE/thermal/entropy and no per-phase relaxation. The reported delta_G_solv_* legs are electronic only; the 1 atm→1 M standard-state term cancels in the water–octanol difference, so logP itself is insensitive to it, but the individual legs are not corrected ΔG* solv.
For chemoinformatic logP, also consider RDKit's Crippen/XLogP (group-contribution).

Single-conformer result: every species was evaluated at ONE geometry, with no conformational/Boltzmann averaging. For a flexible molecule the Boltzmann-averaged free energy over conformers can differ from a single conformer by several kcal/mol — shifting pKa by >1 unit, E° by >0.1 V, and logP by >0.5. If the molecule has rotatable bonds, run conformer-search first and average, or treat this as a screening estimate tied to the input geometry.

prose:
Method provenance
Property: Octanol–water log P (dimensionless partition coefficient)
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical extended tight binding)
Geometry provenance: single-point electronic energies evaluated on the user-supplied pyridine.xyz geometry; no re-optimization.
Solvent model: implicit ALPB solvation (water and n-octanol legs) in xtb; gas-phase geometry used, no explicit solvent molecules.
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (neutral singlet).
Software: xtb (GFN2-xTB engine, version as packaged in chemkit back-end).
Convergence: SCF converged for all three single-point calculations (gas, water, octanol); logP task reported integrity status "ok".

Headline result
log P (octanol/water, 298 K) ≈ 1.3428169 (dimensionless)

Caveats
• Semi-empirical screening accuracy: ±1 log unit typical.
• Single-conformer, electronic-energy-only estimate (no ZPE/thermal/entropy or conformational averaging).
• For drug-design benchmarking, consider group-contribution logP (e.g., RDKit XLogP) or a Boltzmann-averaged multi-conformer protocol.

Reproducibility
Command: chemkit logp --method xtb pyridine.xyz
Live log (SCF cycles, warnings) was written during execution; ask if you’d like the .out path.
